case_title: ZELMA HINES VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF AMEND THE CLAIM, AND DISMISSES THE DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-05-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, L.P.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ELAINE SILBERBERG, REGIONAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, L.P.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HINES, ZELMA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-16-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN FINDS PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE AND DEFENDANT MUST BE RE-SERVED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZELMA HINES. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-28-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZELMA HINES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CASSIA SMITH PROGRAM MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY WAIVES SERVICE. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS THE DEFENDANT IS NOT THE CORRECT PARTY AND THEREFORE DISMISSES THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY WITH PREJUDICE. CASE IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW THE PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM AND NAME AND SERVE THE CORRECT PARTY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HINES, ZELMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, L.P. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINES, ZELMA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-26-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZELMA HINES. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DID NOT APPEAR. AFTER FURTHER INVESTIGATION HONORABLE JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS THAT PROOF OF SERVICE IS NOT ADEQUATE AND MUST BE DONE AGAIN. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINES, ZELMA AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, L.P.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 FILED AT REQUEST OF LITIGANT: NO SFHA DENIAL LETTER (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINES, ZELMA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF ZELMA HINES RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINES, ZELMA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HINES, ZELMA AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ZELMAN HINES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, REPRESENTED BY ELAINE SILBERBERG, REGINAL MANAGER IS PRESENT DANNY RIVERA AND DANIELLE BANKS TESTIFY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERSHIP. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
